====================================================================================================
LUFA
====================================================================================================

The C and makefile source code files in this directory and its subdirectories were downloaded from
the GitHub repository:

    http://www.fourwalledcubicle.com/LUFA.php
    http://web.archive.org/web/20240916165507/http://www.fourwalledcubicle.com/LUFA.php

    https://github.com/abcminiuser/lufa
    https://github.com/abcminiuser/lufa/tags
    https://github.com/abcminiuser/lufa/archive/refs/tags/LUFA-111009.tar.gz
    https://github.com/abcminiuser/lufa/archive/refs/tags/LUFA-210130.tar.gz

Some files and directories that are not strictly required for the use of the library are not
included here to save space.

~~~ Last accessed & checked on 2025-01-12 ~~~

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LUFA - The Lightweight USB Framework for AVRs

Written by Dean Camera
dean@fourwalledcubicle.com

LUFA is released under a modified MIT license. For more details, please refer to the source code or
visit:
    https://github.com/mariusgreuel/LUFA/blob/master/LUFA/License.txt

====================================================================================================
